001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.StreamDataReadinessRequest;
008
009/**
010 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.StreamDataReadinessRequest}, opCode -57, size 0
011 *
012 * <br>
013 *
014 * 
015 * <table border='1'>
016 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
017 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-57</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
018 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>0</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
019 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
020 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
021 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.StreamDataReadinessRequest}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
022 * </table>
023 */
024@MessageProps(
025    opCode=-57,
026    size=0,
027    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
028    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
029    request=StreamDataReadinessRequest.class
030)
031public class StreamDataReadinessResponse extends Message {
032    public StreamDataReadinessResponse() {}
033
034    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
035        this.cargo = raw;
036    }
037}
